name: Benedict Evans
tagline: Warm-gray canvas with coral accent and slab serif. Editorial, considered, MBA-friendly. The aesthetic of Benedict Evans's annual decks.

palette.description: warm-gray paper background, near-black ink for body, vivid coral red for accent. One dark-mode variant for chart slides.

signature_elements: Slab-serif headlines, 56px, sentence case, ends with period
One coral accent per slide — used for the verb or the number, never the whole headline
Header strip with section name (left) and section ID (center) in muted Inter caps
Source citation bottom-left, page number bottom-right
Optional dark-mode variant (slide-dark class) for chart-heavy slides
good_for: Slides that are 80% prose, 20% data — Evans's typical mix
Decks where you want the audience to read, not scan
Charts that need annotation and context, not just bars
Quote slides where one sentence is the entire message
bad_for: Pitch decks where you need bold sales energy
Image-heavy decks where the photos do the talking
